description_long: This modern house features a geometric, multi-level design with a mix of flat and sloped roofs, surrounded by lush trees and landscaping. The exterior is composed of light-colored stone or concrete panels, large glass windows, and dark accent roofing. A series of circular stepping stones lead to the main entrance, which is partially sheltered by an overhanging roof. The property includes a uniquely shaped swimming pool and a variety of mature trees, creating a private and natural atmosphere. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others smaller and more discrete. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on blending indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat and sloped roofs, large glass windows, and a landscaped yard featuring trees and a swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular stepping stones, and a prominent sloped roof section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rear garden, asymmetrical window placement, and the swimming pool to the right.
description_view_2: Back view with a clear view of the swimming pool, flat roof sections, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dark roof, more trees, and the pool partially visible to the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, circular stepping stones, and minimalistic door design
